name: Mainated Chicken Italiano
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the dressing over chicken in a shallow dish.
2. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator, turning occasionally, for 3 hours or overnight.
3. Remove the chicken and set aside, reserving the marinade.
4. Grill or broil the chicken, turning frequently and basting with the reserved marinade until cooked through.
5. This recipe also works well with Wish-Bone Robusto Italian Dressing or Lite Italian Dressing.
